blocks.text: Match preview: England Women face West Indies Women in 22nd Match, Group B (T20) on Wed, 24 Jun, 2026, 11:00 pm at Lord's London. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

blocks.text: Seam-friendly English conditions; overcast skies assist swing bowlers.
